top_signals.title: Speech by Commissioner Albuquerque at the 6th Annual European Financial Integration Conference, organised by the Association for Financial Markets in Europe (AFME)
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Frankfurt, 20 May 2026 Good afternoon, ladies and gentlemen.
Thanks to Adam and the team at AFME for inviting me to speak today.
